issues.description: Vision says first install < 5 minutes on any machine, PRD M1 relaxes to < 10 minutes
issues.from_item: Success criteria: npx agentic-service 在任何机器上 5 分钟内完成首次安装 + 启动
issues.to_item: M1 acceptance: 首次安装（含模型下载）< 10 分钟

issues.description: Vision says '所有能力 API 兼容 OpenAI 标准格式' but PRD REST API table only lists /v1/models, /v1/chat/completions, /v1/messages. Missing /v1/embeddings, /v1/audio/transcriptions, /v1/audio/speech which are implemented in code
issues.from_item: Success criteria: 所有能力 API 兼容 OpenAI 标准格式
issues.to_item: PRD OpenAI/Anthropic 兼容 API section only lists 3 endpoints, missing embeddings and audio endpoints

issues.description: Vision mentions dynamic configuration with auto-recommend on model updates as implicit in 'hardware adaptive', but PRD only covers config hot-update polling in M4 without specifying auto-recommendation on new model releases
issues.from_item: Core value 4: 硬件自适应 — 检测硬件，自动选择最优模型配置
issues.to_item: M4 feature 2: watchProfiles() 每 30s 轮询，ETag 条件获取 — covers hot-update but not auto-recommendation on model updates

issues.description: PRD M3 adds KV store + vector embedding which Vision explicitly lists as non-goal ('不做记忆'). While store/embed are atomic capabilities (not memory/session), the boundary is blurry
issues.from_item: Vision non-goals: 不做记忆 / session / agent 逻辑（业务层的事）
issues.to_item: M3 feature 6: KV 存储 + 向量嵌入 via agentic-store + agentic-embed

issues.description: PRD specifies latency-log.js with record()/p95()/reset() API (no params), Architecture documents record(stage, ms)/p95(stage)/reset() — Architecture adds a 'stage' parameter not in PRD
issues.from_item: PRD: latency-log.js 提供 record()、p95()、reset() 用于延迟统计
issues.to_item: Architecture: latencyLog.record(stage, ms), latencyLog.p95(stage), latencyLog.reset() — adds 'stage' parameter

issues.description: Architecture main API listing (section 4) only lists /v1/models, /v1/chat/completions, /v1/messages — missing /v1/embeddings, /v1/audio/transcriptions, /v1/audio/speech which exist in code and are referenced elsewhere in Architecture
issues.from_item: PRD M2 STT/TTS features + Vision OpenAI compatibility requirement
issues.to_item: Architecture section 4 API listing omits /v1/embeddings, /v1/audio/transcriptions, /v1/audio/speech from main endpoint table

issues.description: Model pool and assignments endpoint paths differ between PRD REST API table and Architecture section 4 code comments
issues.from_item: PRD REST API: GET/POST /api/model-pool, DELETE /api/model-pool/:id, GET/PUT /api/assignments

issues.description: Architecture config.js adds 'code' capability slot not defined in PRD CAPABILITIES list
issues.to_item: Architecture config.js: 能力槽: chat, code, vision, embedding, stt, tts — adds 'code' slot

issues.description: 342 cancelled tasks vs 278 done tasks — high cancellation rate indicates significant rework cycles. All Architecture components now covered by completed tasks.
issues.from_item: Architecture: clean module boundaries for all components
issues.to_item: Task history: 342 cancelled, 278 done — many components have multiple cancelled variants before successful completion

issues.description: M103 milestone was reset (commit 06d35647) but no new tasks have been created yet for the 3 planned items: health check, OpenAI error format, audio format validation
issues.from_item: Architecture M103: 3 planned tasks — GET /api/health, OpenAI error format, audio format validation
issues.to_item: No active M103 tasks exist after milestone reset
